name: sam
role: MacBook co-CEO and voice-first orchestrator; coordinates cross-instance with chief on Mac mini; primary Telegram interface for Hari on MacBook
notes: Only MacBook-side agent with full Telegram credentials. Has per-agent .mcp.json adding mempalace + playwright. Dedup storm observed in out.log (200+ consecutive skips after 4798/4992-byte inject). BUG-011 regression affects restart cycles. ALLOWED_USER was missing on one early boot (out.log line 9); now populated.

name: warden-mb
role: Cross-instance state-parity guard, MacBook M4 Max side; paired with warden-mm on Mac mini for drift detection every 10 minutes
notes: CRITICAL: BOT_TOKEN and CHAT_ID are empty strings in .env. Telegram NOT configured. All send-telegram calls silently fail. Tier-1 alert capability is dead. telegram_polling: false (correct given no creds). Pre-fix this agent loaded 13 MCP servers (~1.5GB RAM); post-restart will load only telegram (still useless). Warden pair atomicity broken since 2026-05-12 14:55Z per warden-mm status field. BUG-011 regression also affects this agent (3 occurrences in error log). Has .serena/project.yml suggesting serena MCP was configured — serena is now globally disabled.

name: pa
role: Personal assistant (Swapna); runs on Hermes runtime with gemma4:31b local model for warm, direct interaction with Hari
notes: Hermes runtime — Claude Code MCP loading does not apply. Cron scheduling is native to Hermes (daemon skips startAgentCronScheduler). Session continuity via SQLite DB existence check, not .jsonl. Stripped 3-step boot protocol (Telegram, heartbeat, inbox only). Has ALLOWED_USER set correctly. telegram_polling: true.

name: chief
role: Mac mini co-CEO and fleet orchestrator; morning/evening briefings, goal cascade, approval routing, fleet health monitoring
cron_schedule: morning-review '0 8 * * *', evening-review '0 18 * * *', weekly-review '0 8 * * 0', graphify-daily '0 2 * * *', heartbeat 5m, check-approvals 5m, lock-watchdog 30m, hb-refresh 1h, hari-decision-reminder 2h
env_vars_present: unknown - Mac mini only, .env not present on MacBook disk
notes: Runs on Mac mini cortextOS instance. .env not present on MacBook disk. model: claude-opus-4-7 (most expensive in fleet). Has graphify-daily cron pointing to a Mac mini path. Activity channel poller for approval inline buttons wired by daemon (orchestrator-only feature).

name: dev
role: Mac mini software engineering specialist; code, architecture, deep research, cortextOS hardening. Heavy work delegated from chief/sam
notes: telegram_polling: false. No BOT_TOKEN/CHAT_ID. telegram MCP loaded globally but useless — no credentials. model: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (cost-optimization for routine tasks).

name: analyst
role: Mac mini research/synthesis specialist; morning brief, weekly AI tooling scan, Sunday synthesis, theta-wave experiments
notes: No model field in config.json — inherits system default. morning-brief cron hardcodes Telegram chat_id 8732135199 in the cron prompt (not via env var) — brittle if CHAT_ID changes. ai-tooling-weekly-scan cron prompt references specific GitHub handles and output paths.

name: research
role: Mac mini Claude research lane; deep research, weekly org self-improvement scan, AI tooling delta, monthly KB hygiene
cron_schedule: heartbeat 4h, hb-refresh 1h, org-improvement-scan '0 7 * * 5', ai-tooling-scan '0 7 * * 1', kb-hygiene '0 8 1 * *', synthesis-review '0 10 1 * *'
notes: telegram_polling: true. Has @Harpal_research_bot. reports_to: chief (primary) + sam (informational) + Hari direct. status field: 'enabled-2026-05-12T17:29Z-security-vp-PASS'.

name: research-codex
role: Mac mini Codex/OpenAI research lane; parallel to research (Claude) lane for dual-lane synth-compare
notes: Depends on Codex CLI authenticated with OpenAI ChatGPT Pro on Mac mini. If codex CLI unavailable, research-director falls back to single-lane. telegram MCP loaded globally but useless. No model field in config.json.

name: research-director
role: Mac mini research orchestrator; dual-lane dispatch to research + research-codex, synth-compare, synth-bias, SHIP/HOLD/ESCALATE verdicts
notes: telegram_polling: false. Boot message goes to chief via bus (not Telegram). Orchestrates 9-step dual-lane research pipeline. Must NOT do research itself — orchestration only.

name: claw-research
role: Mac mini third research lane (Perplexity sonar-pro); independent real-time web-search-native research
notes: telegram_polling: false. Requires PERPLEXITY_API_KEY; if missing returns verdict=blocked. Independent from research and research-codex lanes. Enabled 2026-05-15 per goals.json.

name: warden-mm
role: Mac mini state-parity guard; paired with warden-mb on MacBook for cross-instance drift detection every 10 minutes
notes: telegram_polling: false. context-scan fires every 10 min (*/10 not staggered like warden-mb's 5-59/10). status field explicitly states: 'ADVISORY-ONLY-warden-mb-down-since-14:55Z-pair-atomicity-broken-do-not-trust-single-side-results'. Running single-sided since 2026-05-12 14:55Z.

name: forge
role: Mac mini skill builder, reviewer, and registry; Day-0 scaffold - not yet operational
notes: Day-0 scaffold. Full identity files not yet authored. Awaiting chief signal for Day-6 build. T0 seed bundle must be manually reviewed by chief+dev+Hari before boot. enabled: true in config.json but operational capability is zero.

name: security-vp
role: Mac mini security reviewer; adversarial bootstrap gate for new agents, fleet rescan, cron mutation audit, KB integrity scan
notes: enabled: false in config.json. model: claude-opus-4-7. telegram_polling: true. Was the security gate for warden-mb and warden-mm enablement (passed 2026-05-12). Disabled now — fleet depends on its reviews for new agent bootstraps. cron-mutation-audit is 1h which is aggressive.

name: home-net
role: Mac mini network/security monitor; OPNsense + Suricata + Wazuh + CrowdSec log analysis, firewall management
notes: enabled: false. model: claude-opus-4-7. telegram_polling: false. Has extra approval categories: firewall-write, vpn-revoke, acl-change. red-team-probe cron fires weekly (Sun 06:00) but is STRICTLY scoped to own-IP allow-list.

name: compute
role: Mac mini local Ollama compute orchestrator; routes inference tasks to local models
notes: enabled: false. model: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 for orchestration only — actual inference on local Ollama. No .env file. No Telegram.

name: media
role: Mac mini media pipeline orchestrator; FFmpeg, Resolve, ExifTool job routing
notes: enabled: false. model: claude-sonnet-4-6. Extra approval category: media-publish. No .env file. No Telegram.

name: redteam
role: MacBook red team operator; adversarial penetration testing within own-IP scope; scaffold only
notes: enabled: false. status: scaffolded-awaiting-bootstrap. host_instance: macbook-m4max. Extra approval categories: engagement-execution, scope-expansion. reports_to: security-vp. model: claude-opus-4-7. Decepticon container referenced in cron prompts — not yet deployed.

name: blueteam
role: Mac mini blue team / SIEM; log ingestion, threat detection, ATT&CK-aligned posture synthesis; scaffold only
notes: enabled: false. status: scaffolded-awaiting-bootstrap. host_instance: mac-mini. log-ingestion-tick fires every 15 minutes — most frequent cron in fleet. Extra approval categories: live-rule-deployment, new-sensor-onboarding, cross-surface-rule-change. model: claude-sonnet-4-6. reports_to: security-vp.
